idea: Fix enforce_strict_mode_schema (#22): wrap optional fields in anyOf with null, add anyOf/oneOf/allOf recursion. See .ralph/projects/ for the plan. The function is in src/adapters/process_backend.rs around line 1051. Before adding properties to required, detect which were NOT originally required (i.e. Option<T> with serde(default)) and wrap their schema in {anyOf: [{type: null}, <original>]}. Also recurse into anyOf/oneOf/allOf arrays. Add tests in tests/unit/process_backend_test.rs. This fixes claude CLI crashes at final_review where structured output validation fails because optional fields like FinalReviewProposal.rationale are forced required without null allowance.
